summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MASS INTERIORS marketing website - Final completion phase. All 23 tests passed including hero video with object-cover styling, 8 solution cards with local images, 6 portfolio cards with local images, LeadForm with local image, Resources section with PDF download functionality, Solution detail page, Project detail page with gallery, and Compare page with carousel and comparison table. No Unsplash URLs found anywhere. No JavaScript console errors.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Homepage loads correctly with hero section
TEST 2: Hero video uses local path /assets/images/hero-video.mov
TEST 3: Hero video has object-cover styling for full viewport background
TEST 4: Solutions section shows 8 cards with LOCAL images (no Unsplash)
TEST 5: Portfolio section shows 6 cards with LOCAL images (no Unsplash)
TEST 6: LeadForm section shows LOCAL form-construction.jpg image
TEST 7: Resources section shows 4 cards with 'DOWNLOAD PDF' label
TEST 8: Clicking resource card triggers PDF download (MASS_INTERIORS_CAD_Drawings.pdf)
TEST 9: No JavaScript console errors found
TEST 10: No Unsplash URLs found in any visible image src attributes
TEST 11: Solution detail page (/solutions/fire-rated-partitions) loads correctly
TEST 12: Solution detail hero image uses local path /assets/images/detail-fire-rated-hero.jpg
TEST 13: No Unsplash URLs on solution detail page
TEST 14: Project detail page (/projects/corporate-office-acoustic) loads correctly
TEST 15: Project detail hero image uses local path /assets/images/project-office-hero.jpg
TEST 16: Project gallery images use local paths (2 gallery images found)
TEST 17: No Unsplash URLs on project detail page
TEST 18: Compare page (/compare) loads correctly
TEST 19: Compare page shows correct title 'WHY CHOOSE CEMENT BOARD?'
TEST 20: Compare page images use local paths (5 compare images found)
TEST 21: Carousel next button works
TEST 22: Carousel prev button works
TEST 23: Comparison table found with all board types
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. Hero video with object-cover styling, all images using local /assets/images/ paths, PDF downloads working via jsPDF, no Unsplash URLs remaining, no JavaScript errors. The loading screen takes 3-5 seconds - use sessionStorage.setItem('hasLoaded', 'true') to skip it during testing.

hero_video.details: Video element with object-cover styling, local path /assets/images/hero-video.mov

local_images.details: All images use /assets/images/ paths - no Unsplash URLs found

pdf_downloads.details: Resources section cards trigger jsPDF downloads on click

detail_pages.details: Solution and Project detail pages load with local hero and gallery images

compare_page.details: Carousel navigation, comparison table, local images all working

javascript_errors.details: No console errors - 'e is not defined' bug was fixed
